opportunities.title: [Hiring] Get paid monthly to advertise on your car - Greater montreal area
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Get paid monthly to advertise on your car - Greater montreal area

Get paid monthly to advertise on your car — Montreal drivers wanted Looking for Montreal drivers to join an early driver program. Get paid monthly to display an ad wrap or decal on your car — no extra driving required, just your normal daily routine. No upfront cost, wrap installation and removal covered Payout: $150-350/month depending on wrap type and car model Interested? opportunities.title: [HIRING] Digital Advertising Specialist (Latin America)
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] Digital Advertising Specialist (Latin America)

🔥 WE ARE HIRING 🔥 Digital Advertising Specialist (Latin America) Join a fast-growing full-service advertising agency serving clients across 48 U.S. states and Canada. You’ll build, launch, optimize, and report on paid campaigns across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, AudioGo, and other channels. This is a hands-on agency role for someone comfortable managing multiple client campaigns, solving performance issues, working with tracking and reporting, and collaborating with creative and development teams. Remote status: Fully Remote

opportunities.description:
